checks.name: Prettier
checks.details: The changed TSX file matches repository formatting.

checks.name: ESLint
checks.details: npm run lint completed with zero errors; seven pre-existing unrelated unused-variable warnings remain.

checks.name: Production build
checks.details: npm run build completed and statically generated all song routes.

checks.name: React and Next.js review
checks.details: The existing client boundary and effect cleanup remain intact; the refinement adds no hooks, state, components, dependencies, or server/client boundary changes.

checks.name: Scoped changes
checks.details: Product-code changes remain confined to lead-sheet-renderer.tsx; song data, alphaTex generation, CSS, and dependencies are unchanged.

visual_checks.name: Four-iteration evidence
visual_checks.details: Evidence captures the rejected centered-anchor experiment, three-measure 78% super treatment, lowered 28% treatment, and accepted three-measure 80%/38% treatment.

visual_checks.name: Perceptual chord separation at 390px
visual_checks.details: The densest representative gap increased from 0.6px to 13.8px; A♭△7/G−7 and E♭△7/A♭△7 are visibly distinct chord groups.

visual_checks.name: Modifier legibility and attachment
visual_checks.details: Raised parts increased from 9.576px to 10.944px and their rise decreased from about 9.7px to 3.6px, keeping ♭9, ♯9, and sus4 readable and visually attached to their chord.

visual_checks.name: Notation semantics
visual_checks.details: Fresh-render DOM inspection confirms C△7, G−7, baseline E−7/B♭, raised C7♭9, and raised E7♯9.

visual_checks.name: Available-width fit and redundant labels
visual_checks.details: At 390px inner, client, and scroll widths all equal 390px; representative systems are fully visible and no new labels or chrome were introduced.

visual_checks.name: Desktop regression
visual_checks.details: At 1280px the page loads without an error overlay, has no horizontal overflow, and retains the four-measure desktop setting.

visual_checks.name: Dev-server integrity
visual_checks.details: agent-browser verification found meaningful content and no Next.js error overlay after the final implementation.
